Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}You on your way home? Us too, we just finished eating dinner.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Oh, are you from the same class, Amada-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Oh yeah, Amada, you gotta join next month's soccer tournament![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}We've all been waiting for you, y'know? We can even practice together after school![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}I'm not even sure if I could make it next month.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Aww, come on, we can't win without you! You're better than all of us![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}You can't pressure someone like that. Can't you see you're bothering him?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I'm sure Amada-kun has a lot going on, isn't that right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I'm sorry, please excuse us. You should hurry home too, Amada-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Come on, let's get going. Your grandma is waiting for us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}But Mooom, if Amada doesn't join us, we're gonna get totally creamed![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}I just have enough to do. Second semester has already started, and we have to go to Tartarus at night.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I know we'll be going through a lot from now on, so I decided to not make any promises.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}More importantly, sorry for keeping you out so late.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted with Amada and[n]returned to my room...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}[n]improved after thinking about[n]what's on Amada's mind...[n]{f 1 1}
